title: Formula for Year over year depreciation
excerpt:

posts.author: BiancaTejeda (Bianca Tejeda)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking to see if there is anyone that can help me with a formula and/or automation that could calculate a 30% depreciation value.

We are managing our inventory in monday.com and have a column for purchase price and one for fair market value. I am looking for a way that the fair market value column can reflect a 30% depreciation each year.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @BiancaTejeda, we have a solution for this. You can book in with us here to see if it works for you: https://calendar.app.google/4mdC83Cw27PXPPTw7
